title: Constraint Object
description: Schema for a single constraint rule within the Constraint Port.

rule_id.description: Unique identifier for this constraint rule.

rule_label.description: Human-readable label for this constraint rule.

rule_family.description: Grouping family for related constraint rules.

source_authority.description: The authoritative body or entity that owns this constraint truth.

source_ref.description: Specific reference within the source authority (section, clause, bulletin number).

applies_to.description: Target scope this constraint applies to.

entity_ids.description: Optional list of specific entity identifiers.

entity_filter.description: Optional filter criteria to match applicable entities.

trigger.description: Conditions that activate this constraint evaluation.

context_requirements.description: Required context data for trigger evaluation.

dependency_map.description: External data dependencies required for evaluation.

kernels.description: Kernel sources this rule depends on.

logic_operator.description: The action to take when this constraint is violated.

required_evidence.description: List of evidence items required for evaluation.

decision_on_fail.description: Decision when evaluation cannot complete (fail-closed default: BLOCK).
